summary: Comprehensive testing completed for BikerTechie corporate website MVP. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend pages load correctly with excellent dark navy/purple theme design, purple→blue gradients, and glassmorphism effects. All navigation, forms, and integrations working properly.

design_issues.issue: Toast error messages for form validation could be more prominent for better UX

passed_tests: Backend API - Contact form submission (200 OK)
Backend API - Contact form validation (422 error)
Backend API - Training enrollment validation (422 error)
Backend API - Status check creation (200 OK)
Frontend - All 5 pages load correctly (Home, About, Services, Training, Contact)
Frontend - Navigation between pages works smoothly
Frontend - Hero section with stats, services cards, testimonials display
Frontend - Contact form submission and integration with backend
Frontend - Training enrollment form submission and integration
Frontend - Footer with LinkedIn and Instagram social links
Frontend - Dark navy/purple theme with purple→blue gradients
Frontend - Glassmorphism effects and enterprise-level design
Frontend - Google Cloud Partner badges display
